goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'centre' and should serve 'indian' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '7 people' at '19:15' on 'friday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 17:15' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'saturday' and should go to 'ely'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 'the same group of people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should serve indian food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 19:15 on friday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 17:15 and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on saturday and should go to ely
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
